  "findings": [
    "Trench shield is certified with visible tabulated data and extends above grade",
    "Spoil pile is set back 4 feet from the edge, exceeding the 2-foot minimum requirement",
    "Ladder is located within 10 feet of workers and extends 3 rungs (approx. 3 feet) above grade",
    "Competent person daily inspection log is current and documented"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Continue monitoring trench conditions and weather",
    "Maintain daily competent person inspections before each shift"
  ],
  "rationale": "The trench protective system meets or exceeds all OSHA 1926 Subpart P requirements: the 6-foot depth is protected by a certified shield, the spoil pile is safely set back beyond the 2-foot minimum, a compliant ladder is within the 25-foot lateral travel limit and extends at least 3 feet above the landing, and daily inspections are documented.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2)",
    "OSHA 1926.651(c)(2)",
    "OSHA 1926.652"
  ]
